description_long: This is a modern, two-seater sofa with a sleek, minimalist design, upholstered in smooth taupe leather. The sofa features two large, loose back cushions and two seat cushions, all of which appear plush and generously filled for comfort. The armrests are straight, low, and padded, matching the height of the backrest and contributing to the sofa's clean-lined silhouette. The base is supported by four slender, black metal legs positioned at each corner, giving the sofa a slightly elevated and airy appearance. The upholstery is solid in color with subtle seam lines, and the overall construction suggests a sturdy wooden or metal frame beneath the cushioning. This piece would fit well in contemporary urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or upscale outdoor patios.
description: A contemporary taupe leather two-seater sofa with loose cushions, straight padded armrests, and slim black metal legs. Its clean lines and solid upholstery make it ideal for modern urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large back cushions, two seat cushions, and both straight armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the thickness of the cushions, and the straight armrest profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, uninterrupted back panel and the tops of the back cushions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the armrest and the arrangement of the cushions from the other end.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, loose back cushions and two seat cushions, all uniform in size and shape, placed side by side with no visible attachment.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, low-profile armrests with padding, matching the height of the backrest and featuring a clean, rectangular profile with no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four slender, black metal legs positioned at each corner, straight and exposed, providing an elevated and modern look.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, straight backrest with two large, loose cushions resting against it, continuous and unsegmented with no tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid taupe leather upholstery with a smooth texture and subtle seam lines, no visible pattern or decorative stitching.
